change_categories: Java Calendar <-> .NET DateTimeOffset API adaptation
PDF date string parsing/formatting implemented as static helpers
note: Added GetDate/SetDate methods with PDF date string codec (D:YYYYMMDDHHmmSSOHH'mm'). Java uses DateConverter.toCalendar/toString; C# equivalent parses to DateTimeOffset using ISO-32000 date format. Edge cases: partial dates, huge values, invalid timezone offsets handled gracefully.
